falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear trend reversal from the expected bottom pattern, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 2x the 30-day average on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top scenario, contradicting the bottom pattern match.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would invalidate the current pattern's low-pressure bottom characteristics.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
